description: Golden Dataset for Objective 2 (thesis paper, Section 3.2.1). Expand to 30-50 standardized academic queries. Every ground_truth answer must be derived directly from the CCSICT thesis corpus and validated by a panel of three CCSICT faculty members before serving as the benchmark for the Ragas evaluation.

queries.source_thesis: REPLACE: exact thesis title, authors, and year.
